mapper.sql: SELECT config_id, equipment_id, equipment_name, collect_mode, collect_status, collect_hours, collect_count, param1_name, param1_unit, param1_alarm_min, param1_alarm_max, param2_name, param2_unit, param2_alarm_min, param2_alarm_max, param3_name, param3_unit, param3_alarm_min, param3_alarm_max, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM dms_data_collection_config
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0' AND equipment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{equipmentName}, '%') AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY config_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dms_data_collection_config ( equipment_id, equipment_name, collect_mode, collect_status, collect_hours, collect_count, param1_name, param1_unit, param1_alarm_min, param1_alarm_max, param2_name, param2_unit, param2_alarm_min, param2_alarm_max, param3_name, param3_unit, param3_alarm_min, param3_alarm_max, status, create_by, create_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{equipmentId}, #{equipmentName}, #{collectMode}, #{collectStatus}, #{collectHours}, #{collectCount}, #{param1Name}, #{param1Unit}, #{param1AlarmMin}, #{param1AlarmMax}, #{param2Name}, #{param2Unit}, #{param2AlarmMin}, #{param2AlarmMax}, #{param3Name}, #{param3Unit}, #{param3AlarmMin}, #{param3AlarmMax}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.delete: UPDATE dms_data_collection_config SET del_flag = '2' WHERE config_id IN #{configId}
